Kristina L. Velarde, Esq. of CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY 391-1113 for Defendants demurring party
Raquel Fox, Esq. of the TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. 771-9850 for Plaintiffs opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Demurrer - overruled as to all causes of action except 9th cause of action for fraud. 10 days to answer. Sustained as to 9th cause of action for fraud with leave to amend. Motion to strike as to punitive damage allegation is moot. Motion to strike - denied except as to term "Latino" - granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
